response:
```sql
SELECT 
    p.id,
    p.name,
    SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS revenue
FROM 
    products p
JOIN 
    order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
JOIN 
    orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE 
    o.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 months')
    AND o.created_at < DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;
```
